email_body:
Beste Ann Fossé,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor E-commerce & Digital Content Specialist bij Bright Potentials. Uw oproep voor een digitale duizendpoot die online content beheert en optimaliseert sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik commerciële copy en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik werk met CMS-systemen, analyseer prestaties via GA4 en SEMrush, en denk mee over structuur en conversie. Mijn eigen project mirook.com toont mijn vermogen om contentstrategie, SEO en social media te combineren.

Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig en nauwkeurig te werken met deadlines, en schakel vlot tussen verschillende taken. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief; communicatie in het Engels verloopt vlot.

Ik kom graag langs om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ann Fossé,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the E-commerce & Digital Content Specialist position at Bright Potentials. Your call for a digital all-rounder who manages and optimizes online content fits perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write commercial copy, and manage WordPress sites. I work with CMS systems, analyze performance via GA4 and SEMrush, and contribute to structure and conversion. My own project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to combine content strategy, SEO, and social media.

I am used to working independently and accurately with deadlines, and I switch easily between different tasks. My B1 Dutch is improving actively; communication in English is fluent.

I would love to discuss my motivation further in person.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Ann Fossé,

Toen ik de vacature voor E-commerce & Digital Content Specialist bij Bright Potentials las, voelde ik meteen een klik. U zoekt iemand die digitaal sterk is, oog heeft voor structuur en commerciële impact, en zelfstandig content beheert – dat is precies waar ik in groei.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO en het schrijven van commerciële, zoekwoordgerichte content voor klantwebsites. Ik werk dagelijks met WordPress (Elementor, Astra) en CMS-systemen, en optimaliseer pagina’s voor conversie en vindbaarheid. Daarnaast analyseer ik prestaties via GA4, Google Search Console en SEMrush, en vertaal ik inzichten naar gerichte acties. Die combinatie van operationeel contentbeheer en datagedreven optimalisatie sluit naadloos aan bij deze functie.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en GEO-technieken toe om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik experimenteer continu met nieuwe manieren om impact te vergroten, zoals u in de vacature beschrijft.

Ik ben gewend om samen te werken met designers, copywriters en productmarketing, en schakel vlot tussen taken. Mijn oog voor detail en commerciële insteek helpen me om producten correct en aantrekkelijk online te zetten. Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog B1 is, volg ik lessen om het verder te verbeteren; in het Engels communiceer ik vlot.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ann Fossé,

When I read the vacancy for E-commerce & Digital Content Specialist at Bright Potentials, I felt an immediate connection. You are looking for someone who is digitally strong, has an eye for structure and commercial impact, and manages content independently – that is exactly where I am growing.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO and writing commercial, keyword-targeted content for client websites. I work daily with WordPress (Elementor, Astra) and CMS systems, and optimize pages for conversion and findability. Additionally, I analyze performance via GA4, Google Search Console, and SEMrush, and translate insights into targeted actions. This combination of operational content management and data-driven optimization aligns perfectly with this role.

On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I continuously experiment with new ways to increase impact, as you describe in the vacancy.

I am used to collaborating with designers, copywriters, and product marketing, and I switch easily between tasks. My eye for detail and commercial approach help me put products online correctly and attractively. Although my Dutch is still B1, I am taking classes to improve it; I communicate fluently in English.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• CMS & e-commerce: WordPress site building and content management (Elementor, Astra) with experience in product page optimization and commercial copywriting
• SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO/AEO techniques to boost online visibility
• Analytics: GA4, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs – translating data into actionable improvements
• Content & social: writing keyword-targeted blog content, social media integration, and newsletter coordination (via CRM lead)
• Independent & detail-oriented: self-starter with experience managing multiple projects and deadlines, comfortable in a fast-paced environment
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
